data.title: Cargojet Receives BBB (low) Credit Rating with Stable Outlook
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Cargojet ( (TSE:CJT) ) has issued an update.

Cargojet Inc. has been assigned an investment-grade issuer credit rating of BBB (low) with a stable trend by Morningstar DBRS. This rating reflects Cargojet’s strong market position in the Canadian domestic overnight air cargo market, efficient operations, and commitment to maintaining leverage within its target range. The credit rating is expected to enhance Cargojet’s financial flexibility, allowing the company to pursue opportunities to improve its cost of capital and strengthen its balance sheet.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:CJT) stock is a Hold with a C$120.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cargojet stock, see the TSE:CJT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CJT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CJT is a Outperform.

Cargojet’s overall score is driven by strong earnings call results and a favorable valuation. The company’s financial performance is solid, though increasing leverage and negative free cash flow are areas of concern. Technical indicators are positive, supporting a bullish outlook. The strategic initiatives and record revenue growth further enhance its position.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CJT stock, click here.

More about Cargojet

Cargojet is Canada’s leading provider of time-sensitive premium air cargo services, offering dedicated, ACMI, and international charter services across North America. The company operates a fleet of 41 cargo aircraft, transporting over 25 million pounds of cargo weekly.

Average Trading Volume: 85,877

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$1.47B

JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6680) ) just unveiled an update.

JL MAG Rare-Earth Co., Ltd. has announced proposed amendments to its Articles of Association and the rules of procedure for both its Shareholders’ General Meetings and Board of Directors. These changes aim to enhance the company’s standardized operations and improve its corporate governance structure, aligning with Chinese corporate law and regulatory guidelines. The proposed amendments are pending approval at the company’s general meeting, after which the management will handle the necessary industrial and commercial registrations.

Belo Sun Mining ( (TSE:BSX) ) has issued an announcement.

Belo Sun Mining Corp. announced that Ms. Ayesha Hira will step down as Interim President & CEO on July 4, 2025, as part of a planned leadership transition. During her tenure, Ms. Hira strengthened stakeholder engagement in Brazil, secured support from Indigenous Associations, clarified permitting authority, and attracted a new cornerstone investor, positioning the company favorably for the advancement of the Volta Grande Project.

data.title: Fletcher Building Settles Claims on Puhoi to Warkworth Project
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

An announcement from Fletcher Building Limited ( (FRCEF) ) is now available.

Fletcher Building Limited has reached a settlement with the New Zealand Transport Agency and the Northern Express Group regarding claims related to delays in the Puhoi to Warkworth motorway project, caused by COVID-19 and adverse weather conditions. The settlement, although less than initially expected, resolves a longstanding issue and will result in a $16.4 million loss for FY25, while also bringing in $56 million in cash proceeds. The resolution marks progress in addressing legacy project issues, with additional insurance claims and minor matters still pending.

More about Fletcher Building Limited

Fletcher Building Limited is a prominent company in the construction industry, known for its involvement in large-scale infrastructure projects. The company focuses on delivering comprehensive construction services and has a significant market presence in New Zealand.

This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the company’s financial health and performance, potentially impacting its market positioning and investor relations.

Aecon Group Inc. is a North American construction and infrastructure development company with global experience. It provides integrated solutions to private and public-sector clients through its Construction segment in various sectors, including Civil, Urban Transportation, Nuclear, Utility, and Industrial.
